refinement_sections.content: We need to figure out if people will want to buy our new drink and what might make them want to buy it. We should think about things like trends in drinks, what people like, and what makes a drink popular.
Identify things that could affect how well our drink sells, such as taste, price, packaging, and advertising. Also consider the competition and what they are doing.
Look at how many people might want to buy our drink and at what price. We can create a simple survey or use our own ideas about what people might think.
Think about how much to charge for our drink. We want to make money but also get people to try it. We could look at prices of similar drinks to help decide.
Plan how to show our ideas to the bosses. We could use charts or graphs to make it clear. Maybe show some pictures of the drink or examples of advertising.
Write everything down in a clear way. Include our ideas about demand, pricing, and how we will present it. Make sure it’s easy to understand.
